message:
fix(packs): implement pack-aware quick reject (P0 bug fix)

Previously, the global quick reject only checked for "git" and "rm" keywords,
causing non-core packs (docker, kubectl, etc.) to be unreachable in hook mode.
Commands like "docker system prune" or "kubectl delete namespace" would
return early before reaching the pack registry check.

Changes:
- Add `PackRegistry::collect_enabled_keywords()` to gather keywords from all
  enabled packs
- Add `pack_aware_quick_reject()` that checks all enabled pack keywords
- Update main.rs to compute enabled packs early and use pack-aware quick reject
- Add comprehensive regression tests (10 new tests)

The fix maintains <10μs performance for the quick reject hot path by using
SIMD-accelerated substring search (memchr) for each keyword.

Closes: git_safety_guard-99e.1, git_safety_guard-99e.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
